title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hold on now!! Everyone just calm down

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: One member is opposed to this motion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even I might have taken issue ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They conduct their necessary dealings in shadow....!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: in the shadows, he goes by "Joker."

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
